evals.prompt: Generate some art for my Samsung Frame TV
evals.expected_output: Runs frame_tv_art.py with --prompt and a suitable art description, generates an image and shows the output path with TV size info

evals.prompt: Resize this photo for my 65 inch Frame TV: /tmp/beach.jpg
evals.expected_output: Runs frame_tv_art.py with --resize /tmp/beach.jpg --tv 65, shows resized dimensions and output path

evals.prompt: Create a calm ocean sunset painting for my living room TV
evals.expected_output: Runs frame_tv_art.py with --prompt describing an ocean sunset painting, generates art sized for Frame TV
